mapper.select: SELECT CAT_CD, CAT_NM, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS UPD_DTM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY sub WHERE sub.CAT_CD = main.CAT_CD AND sub.SUB_CAT_CD != '00' AND sub.DEL_YN = 'N') AS SUB_CNT FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY main WHERE SUB_CAT_CD = '00' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER

SELECT CAT_CD, SUB_CAT_CD, CAT_NM, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, DATE_FORMAT(UPD_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS UPD_DTM FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY WHERE CAT_CD = #{catCd} AND SUB_CAT_CD != '00' AND DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_ORDER
mapper.update: INSERT INTO TB_PROP_CATEGORY (CAT_CD, SUB_CAT_CD, CAT_NM, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, CRE_USR_CD, CRE_DTM, UPD_USR_CD, UPD_DTM, DEL_YN) VALUES (#{catCd}, '00', #{catNm}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW(), #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW(), 'N') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CAT_NM = #{catNm}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd}, UPD_DTM = NOW()

INSERT INTO TB_PROP_CATEGORY (CAT_CD, SUB_CAT_CD, CAT_NM, SORT_ORDER, USE_YN, CRE_USR_CD, CRE_DTM, UPD_USR_CD, UPD_DTM, DEL_YN) VALUES (#{catCd}, #{subCatCd}, #{catNm}, #{sortOrder}, #{useYn}, #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW(), #{ssnUsrCd}, NOW(), 'N') ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE CAT_NM = #{catNm}, SORT_ORDER = #{sortOrder}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPD_USR_CD = #{ssnUsrCd}, UPD_DTM = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT LPAD(IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUB_CAT_CD AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 2, '0') FROM TB_PROP_CATEGORY WHERE CAT_CD = #{catCd} AND SUB_CAT_CD != '00' AND DEL_YN = 'N'
